<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a TypeScript Express backend for a baseball roster API. The main endpoint is `/api/roster?team=TEAM_CODE` and it should scrape player names, positions, and stats from ESPN for the given MLB team code. Use best practices for error handling and efficient web scraping with Selenium.
